---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Description**
A clear description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

**Use case**
Why would this be useful? Describe the problem it solves or the workflow it improves.

**Suggested solution**
If you have an idea for how it could work, describe it here.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought of.
